patch.value: governance.create_default_type is not settable via pm config set
create_default_type is documented and used at create time but absent from CONFIG_KEY_VALUES, so agents cannot set it without hand-editing settings.json.
Add governance_create_default_type (+kebab alias) to CONFIG_KEY_VALUES/ALIASES/SUMMARIES/readConfigValue and the set dispatch; config-command test.
create_default_type is documented and used at create time but absent from CONFIG_KEY_VALUES, so agents cannot set it without hand-editing settings.json.
